minutes_briefs.title: Burnaby Bylaw 14824 changes how development applications are processed
minutes_briefs.summary: The City of Burnaby passed Bylaw 14824, a new Development Procedures Bylaw for 2026. This bylaw (a local law passed by the city council) replaces the old rules for how developers and property owners apply for permission to build or redevelop land. It changes the application process, submission requirements, and timelines for getting development approvals from the city.
minutes_briefs.action_required: Review the new bylaw to understand updated application requirements and timelines before submitting any new development application in Burnaby.

key_dates.label: Burnaby Development Procedures Bylaw 2026 takes effect
